std-ap-bill.name: std-ap-bill
std-ap-bill.description: std-ap-bill — accounts-payable bill (vendor bills we owe). Lists bills with Pay / Void actions. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes Financial-pattern knobs (currency, taxStrategy, gracePeriodDays, lateFeePolicy, …).

std-applicant.name: std-applicant
std-applicant.description: std-applicant — job applicant pipeline (stage field, not status). Exposes HR knobs (backgroundCheckRequired, eVerifyRequired, anonymizeOnRejection, …).

std-application.name: std-application
std-application.description: std-application — job-style application bundle: form + attachments + status flow (draft/submitted/under-review/accepted/rejected). Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes HR-pattern knobs (backgroundCheckRequired, eVerifyRequired, anonymizeOnRejection, …) for the questionnaire.

std-appointment-policy.name: std-appointment-policy
std-appointment-policy.description: std-appointment-policy — shared reschedule/cancellation/no-show policy referenced by std-interview-slot, std-class-session, std-event, std-court-deadline via a policyId knob. Author one policy + reuse across appointment types. Exposes Scheduling-pattern knobs.

std-approval-request.name: std-approval-request
std-approval-request.description: std-approval-request — approver inbox / triage queue for approval workflows. Configurable behaviors include: require-comment-on-reject (force a written reason on reject), require-photo-on-complete, require-signature-on-complete, escalation-threshold-hours, resolution-sla-hours, dispatch-strategy (nearest / round-robin / manual), customer-visible-statuses. Use when the user voices ANY review-and-approve-or-reject flow — an approver / editor / moderator opens a queue, reviews each item, then approves or rejects (often with required feedback on reject). Covers operational queues (timesheets, expenses, POs, change orders, time-off), editorial / content moderation (drafts pending review, posts awaiting approval, comments queued), code-review-style sign-off, and any flow where items gate on a designated approver before going live. Use std-approval-chain for sequential single-item approvals across multiple approvers.

std-campaign-goal.name: std-campaign-goal
std-campaign-goal.description: std-campaign-goal — nonprofit fundraising campaign with Launch / End actions. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes CRM-pattern knobs.

std-change-order.name: std-change-order
std-change-order.description: std-change-order — construction change-order ledger with Approve / Reject / Execute / Delete. Configurable behaviors include: currency, tax-strategy (inclusive / exclusive / none), rounding-mode, grace-period-days, late-fee-policy (none / flat / percent), late-fee-amount, compliance-jurisdiction, retention-years. Use when the user voices a project change-order log with monetary deltas, tax handling, and a compliance retention window. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions.

std-chart-of-accounts.name: std-chart-of-accounts
std-chart-of-accounts.description: std-chart-of-accounts — accounts catalog (asset/liability/equity/revenue/expense) with Activate / Deactivate actions. Exposes Financial-pattern knobs (currency, jurisdiction, retention).

std-checkin.name: std-checkin
std-checkin.description: std-checkin — arrival check-in atom (qr / geo). Configurable behaviors include: booking-window-days, lead-time-minutes, booking-hours, blackout-dates, no-show-grace-period-minutes, reschedule-window-hours, max-reschedules, cancellation-policy (free / partial-refund / no-refund). Use when the user voices an arrival / sign-in / kiosk flow with windowing, lead-time, no-show grace, or reschedule limits.

std-checkout-terminal.name: std-checkout-terminal
std-checkout-terminal.description: std-checkout-terminal — POS checkout sessions. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-void abandoned. Exposes Scheduling + Restaurant/POS knobs (bookingHours, serviceCharge, tipPresets, …).

std-class-roster.name: std-class-roster
std-class-roster.description: std-class-roster — members enrolled in a class session. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can auto-transition. Exposes Scheduling/Booking + HR knobs (bookingWindowDays, noShowGracePeriodMinutes, anonymizeOnRejection, …).

std-class-session.name: std-class-session
std-class-session.description: std-class-session — scheduled fitness/class session. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can auto-transition. Exposes Scheduling/Booking knobs (bookingWindowDays, leadTimeMinutes, cancellationPolicy, …).

std-conversation-policy.name: std-conversation-policy
std-conversation-policy.description: std-conversation-policy — chat/realtime governance: retention, e2ee, moderation mode, edit/delete windows.

std-court-deadline.name: std-court-deadline
std-court-deadline.description: std-court-deadline — statutory filing deadline tied to a legal matter. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-miss / auto-complete. Exposes Scheduling + Legal knobs (bookingWindowDays, practiceArea, conflictCheckRequired, …).

std-customer-account.name: std-customer-account
std-customer-account.description: std-customer-account — retail customer profile with loyalty points, store credit, and Grant Points / Issue Credit / Ban actions. Configurable behaviors include: health-score-threshold-alert, renewal-reminder-days-before, archive-inactive-after-days, gdpr-consent-required, lifecycle-stage-policy (linear / branching / none), contact-frequency-cap-per-week, default-retention-years. Use when the user voices a customer directory with loyalty, consent, contact-cadence caps, or inactivity-archive rules. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions.

std-device-fleet.name: std-device-fleet
std-device-fleet.description: std-device-fleet — IoT device fleet provisioning + OTA firmware + certificate rotation. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions.

std-document.name: std-document
std-document.description: std-document — document lifecycle with classification, retention, and lock. Listens for SET_STATUS so siblings can drive automated transitions. Composes naturally with std-file-store / std-version-history / std-esign-request at the organism level.

std-donation-receipt.name: std-donation-receipt
std-donation-receipt.description: std-donation-receipt — tax-deductible donation receipt with IRS-compliance fields and Email / Void actions. Exposes Financial-pattern knobs (currency, jurisdiction, retention).

std-donor.name: std-donor
std-donor.description: std-donor — nonprofit donor (individual/org/foundation) with Thank / Solicit actions. Exposes CRM-pattern knobs (alert threshold, reminder cadence, archive policy, consent).

std-drip-sequence.name: std-drip-sequence
std-drip-sequence.description: std-drip-sequence — ordered email drip campaign primitive. Lists sequences; detail embeds the std-step-flow-cards-deck variation to walk the ordered step sequence (ADVANCE activates, REJECT/ESCALATE pause). Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions. Exposes Communication knobs (sendsPerHour, gdprConsentRequired, unsubscribe link, …).

std-driver.name: std-driver
std-driver.description: std-driver — fleet driver primitive (license/hire/status/vehicle). Lists drivers; detail offers Suspend / Reinstate / Terminate / Assign Vehicle. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes Inventory/Logistics knobs (defaultWarehouse, serialTracking, …).

std-dunning.name: std-dunning
std-dunning.description: std-dunning — failed-payment escalation ladder. Lists / escalates / resolves / suspends dunning cases. Configurable behaviors include: currency, tax-strategy, grace-period-days, late-fee-policy (none / flat / percent), late-fee-amount, compliance-jurisdiction, retention-years. Use when the user voices a failed-payment retry / collections ladder with grace periods, late-fee rules, and a regulated retention window. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions.

std-email-broadcast.name: std-email-broadcast
std-email-broadcast.description: std-email-broadcast — send an email blast to a segment of contacts using a chosen template. Lists broadcasts; detail offers Send / Cancel. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions. Exposes Communication knobs (sendsPerHour, gdprConsentRequired, unsubscribe link, …).

std-event.name: std-event
std-event.description: std-event — event-ticketing event entity. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can auto-transition. Exposes Scheduling/Booking knobs (bookingWindowDays, leadTimeMinutes, cancellationPolicy, …).

std-form-builder.name: std-form-builder
std-form-builder.description: std-form-builder — survey composer: list of surveys, detail with inline question + branching-rules editors. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions. Exposes Content/Knowledge knobs (visibilityScope, enabledLocales, …).

std-health-score.name: std-health-score
std-health-score.description: std-health-score — customer success composite score (usage/support/engagement) with Recalculate / Assign CSM. Exposes CRM-pattern knobs (alert threshold, reminder cadence, archive policy, consent).

std-help-article.name: std-help-article
std-help-article.description: std-help-article — public help center article (title, body, category, status, view count). Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions. Exposes Content/Knowledge knobs (visibilityScope, keepVersions, enabledLocales, …).

std-help-category.name: std-help-category
std-help-category.description: std-help-category — help center category directory grouping articles (Getting Started, Billing, API Reference…). Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions. Exposes Content/Knowledge knobs (visibilityScope, enabledLocales, …).

std-helpdesk-ticket.name: std-helpdesk-ticket
std-helpdesk-ticket.description: std-helpdesk-ticket — support ticket lifecycle (new → open → pending → resolved → closed). Listens for SET_STATUS so siblings can drive automated transitions. Exposes Helpdesk-pattern knobs (slaTier, severity, response/resolution SLA, escalationMatrix, routingStrategy, …).

std-incident.name: std-incident
std-incident.description: std-incident — devops/oncall incident lifecycle (open → acknowledged → investigating → mitigated → resolved). Listens for SET_STATUS so siblings can drive automated transitions. Exposes Incident-pattern knobs (severity, runbookId, pagedRoles, escalation, postmortem threshold, …).

std-insurance-claim.name: std-insurance-claim
std-insurance-claim.description: std-insurance-claim — insurance claim lifecycle (draft → eligible → submitted → accepted → denied → paid) with EDI submission knobs.

std-interview-slot.name: std-interview-slot
std-interview-slot.description: std-interview-slot — scheduled interview between applicant and interviewers. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes Scheduling/Booking + HR knobs (bookingWindowDays, leadTimeMinutes, backgroundCheckRequired, …).

std-invoice.name: std-invoice
std-invoice.description: std-invoice — invoice generation atom. Owns an Invoice entity (line-items + tax + total + refund tiers via config). Browses invoices in a data-grid with Send / Mark-Paid / Void / Refund actions; viewing state renders the canonical invoice pattern detail. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions (e.g. sent → overdue after 30d). Exposes Financial-pattern knobs (currency, taxStrategy, gracePeriodDays, lateFeePolicy, …) for the questionnaire.

std-kitchen-display.name: std-kitchen-display
std-kitchen-display.description: std-kitchen-display — restaurant POS kitchen ticket board (Mark Preparing / Ready / Served). Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can age tickets. Exposes Restaurant/POS knobs (kitchenAutoFire, coursingEnabled, allergenWarningsEnabled, …).

std-lease.name: std-lease
std-lease.description: std-lease — owner-side lease records (tenant ↔ unit, dates, monthly rent, status). Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions (active → expired). Exposes Real-estate knobs (leaseRenewalNoticeDays, securityDepositMonths, lateRentGraceDays, …).

std-ledger-entry.name: std-ledger-entry
std-ledger-entry.description: std-ledger-entry — general-ledger journal entry (double-entry debit/credit) with Reconcile / Reverse actions. Exposes Financial-pattern knobs (currency, jurisdiction, retention).

std-legal-hold.name: std-legal-hold
std-legal-hold.description: std-legal-hold — legal hold trigger, duration, and release approval; companion to std-matter and std-court-deadline.

std-maintenance-request.name: std-maintenance-request
std-maintenance-request.description: std-maintenance-request — tenant request lifecycle. Configurable behaviors include: response-time-minutes, resolution-sla-hours, escalation-threshold-hours, dispatch-strategy (nearest / round-robin / manual), service-area-radius, skills-required, require-photo-on-complete, require-signature-on-complete, customer-visible-statuses, cancellation-policy. Use when the user voices a tenant / field-service request triage with SLA, dispatch, and evidence-on-complete needs. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-escalate.

std-margin-account.name: std-margin-account
std-margin-account.description: std-margin-account — margin account leverage and call thresholds for trading apps.

std-matter.name: std-matter
std-matter.description: std-matter — legal matter primitive (case with client, status, lead attorney). Lists matters; detail offers Close / Hold / Reopen. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions. Exposes Legal knobs (practiceArea, confidentialityLevel, conflictCheckRequired, …).

std-membership.name: std-membership
std-membership.description: std-membership — gym/club membership with tier, renewal, freeze, cancel. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes CRM-pattern knobs.

std-menu.name: std-menu
std-menu.description: std-menu — restaurant POS menu items grouped by category with availability windows. Manage trait loads, browses, persists Create / Update / Toggle-Available / Delete. Exposes Restaurant/POS knobs (serviceCharge, tipPresets, allergenWarningsEnabled, …).

std-moderation-rule.name: std-moderation-rule
std-moderation-rule.description: std-moderation-rule — content moderation policy layer over std-mod-queue with thresholds, auto-actions, appeal + escalation.

std-modifier-group.name: std-modifier-group
std-modifier-group.description: std-modifier-group — restaurant menu item customization groups (required/optional/multi-select). Manage trait persists Create / Update / Delete. Exposes Restaurant/POS knobs (allergenWarningsEnabled, coursingEnabled, tipPresets, …).

std-nps-survey.name: std-nps-survey
std-nps-survey.description: std-nps-survey — NPS survey primitive tracking per-customer Net Promoter Score responses, category, comment, follow-up. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can mark stale rows expired. Exposes Communication knobs (sendsPerHour, gdprConsentRequired, …).

std-offer-letter.name: std-offer-letter
std-offer-letter.description: std-offer-letter — formal job offer lifecycle. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-expire offers past expiresAt. Exposes HR knobs (backgroundCheckRequired, eVerifyRequired, anonymizeOnRejection, …).

std-patient.name: std-patient
std-patient.description: std-patient — patient record management with PHI handling, consent gating, and status lifecycle. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions.

std-payout-ledger.name: std-payout-ledger
std-payout-ledger.description: std-payout-ledger — marketplace vendor payout ledger with Withdraw / Mark Paid actions. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes Financial-pattern knobs.

std-portfolio.name: std-portfolio
std-portfolio.description: std-portfolio — portfolio rebalancing, tax-lot accounting, and drift policies for trading apps.

std-prescription.name: std-prescription
std-prescription.description: std-prescription — prescription lifecycle (draft → signed → sent → dispensed) with controlled-substance, refill, and pharmacist-consult knobs.

std-question-bank.name: std-question-bank
std-question-bank.description: std-question-bank — typed question library for surveys. Lists questions; detail offers Update / Delete. Exposes Content/Knowledge knobs (visibilityScope, enabledLocales, keepVersions, …).

std-receipt.name: std-receipt
std-receipt.description: std-receipt — receipt primitive with Email / Reprint actions. Exposes Financial-pattern knobs (currency, taxStrategy, jurisdiction, retention).

std-recurring-charge.name: std-recurring-charge
std-recurring-charge.description: std-recurring-charge — subscription cycle clock with Charge / Cancel actions. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes Financial-pattern knobs.

std-renewal-risk.name: std-renewal-risk
std-renewal-risk.description: std-renewal-risk — Customer Success renewal risk tracker with Mark Saved / Mark Churned actions. Configurable behaviors include: risk-tier-thresholds (low / medium / high score bands), intervention-playbook-id, health-score-threshold-alert, renewal-reminder-days-before, archive-inactive-after-days, consent-tracking-enabled. Use when the user voices a CS health-score / churn-risk board with tiered intervention bands and renewal reminders. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions.

std-rent-charge.name: std-rent-charge
std-rent-charge.description: std-rent-charge — monthly rent charge ledger with Mark Paid / Late Fee / Waive. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes Financial + Real-Estate-pattern knobs.

std-reorder-rule.name: std-reorder-rule
std-reorder-rule.description: std-reorder-rule — automatic stock-replenishment rule per SKU/location. Lists rules; detail offers Enable / Disable. Exposes Inventory/Logistics knobs (defaultWarehouse, lowStockThreshold, …) for the questionnaire.

std-response-collector.name: std-response-collector
std-response-collector.description: std-response-collector — survey per-respondent answer accumulator. Lists responses; detail offers Resubmit / Delete. Exposes Communication knobs (suppressionListEnabled, gdprConsentRequired, …) for the questionnaire.

std-rfi.name: std-rfi
std-rfi.description: std-rfi — RFI pipeline for construction projects. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-close stale RFIs. Exposes Service/Operations knobs (responseTimeMinutes, resolutionSLAHours, …).

std-route-optimize.name: std-route-optimize
std-route-optimize.description: std-route-optimize — multi-stop route ordering for technician dispatch. Lists routes; detail offers Optimize / Reset. Exposes Inventory/Logistics knobs (defaultWarehouse, multiLocationEnabled, hazmatEnabled, …) for the questionnaire.

std-runbook.name: std-runbook
std-runbook.description: std-runbook — operational runbook lifecycle (draft → active → deprecated) with auto-execute policy + approval gates + rollback.

std-segment.name: std-segment
std-segment.description: std-segment — contact segment primitive grouping contacts by criteria with Recalculate action. Exposes CRM-pattern knobs (health-score threshold, reminder cadence, archive policy, consent).

std-sensor-threshold.name: std-sensor-threshold
std-sensor-threshold.description: std-sensor-threshold — sensor alert bands with dwell/hysteresis; sibling to std-telematics-event for IoT monitoring.

std-stock-level.name: std-stock-level
std-stock-level.description: std-stock-level — on-hand quantity primitive for a SKU at a location. Lists stock rows; detail offers Adjust / Recount. Exposes Inventory/Logistics knobs (lowStockThreshold, reorderPoint, multiLocationEnabled, …) for the questionnaire.

std-submittal.name: std-submittal
std-submittal.description: std-submittal — construction submittal lifecycle. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-escalate SLA breaches. Exposes Service/Operations knobs (responseTimeMinutes, resolutionSLAHours, …).

std-table-map.name: std-table-map
std-table-map.description: std-table-map — restaurant POS interactive floor plan: TableNode draggable nodes with seat/clear/select/move actions. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive table-status transitions. Exposes Restaurant/POS knobs (allowSplitChecks, allergenWarningsEnabled, …).

std-technician-dispatch.name: std-technician-dispatch
std-technician-dispatch.description: std-technician-dispatch — dispatch board for field technicians. Exposes Service/Operations knobs (serviceAreaRadius, dispatchStrategy, responseTimeMinutes, …).

std-telematics-event.name: std-telematics-event
std-telematics-event.description: std-telematics-event — read-only per-vehicle telemetry stream (GPS/OBD-II). Lists events, detail offers Acknowledge. Exposes Inventory/Logistics knobs (defaultWarehouse, hazmatEnabled, …) for the questionnaire.

std-template-editor.name: std-template-editor
std-template-editor.description: std-template-editor — message template authoring primitive. Lists templates; detail offers Edit / Save / Delete. Exposes Content/Knowledge knobs (visibilityScope, enabledLocales, keepVersions, …).

std-tenant.name: std-tenant
std-tenant.description: std-tenant — person/company occupying a leased unit. Lists tenants; detail offers Activate / Move Out. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions. Exposes Real-estate knobs (leaseRenewalNoticeDays, petPolicy, lateRentGraceDays, …).

std-ticket-tier.name: std-ticket-tier
std-ticket-tier.description: std-ticket-tier — event ticket pricing tiers (VIP, general, early-bird) with quantity tracking. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive transitions (sold-out / closed). Exposes Restaurant/POS + Financial knobs (currency, tipPresets, taxStrategy, …).

std-time-entry.name: std-time-entry
std-time-entry.description: std-time-entry — time tracking line within a timesheet. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-submit / auto-approve. Exposes HR knobs (backgroundCheckRequired, anonymizeOnRejection, …).

std-timesheet.name: std-timesheet
std-timesheet.description: std-timesheet — weekly timesheet primitive. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-close periods. Exposes HR knobs (backgroundCheckRequired, anonymizeOnRejection, …).

std-trade-order.name: std-trade-order
std-trade-order.description: std-trade-order — trade-order lifecycle (pending → working → filled) with position limits, VaR ceilings, and pre-trade risk-check knobs.

std-trial.name: std-trial
std-trial.description: std-trial — subscription trial countdown with Convert / Expire / Cancel actions. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes CRM-pattern knobs.

std-vehicle.name: std-vehicle
std-vehicle.description: std-vehicle — fleet vehicle primitive. Lists vehicles + map; detail offers Assign Driver / Maintenance / Retire. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions. Exposes Inventory/Logistics knobs (defaultWarehouse, serialTracking, …).

std-vendor-onboarding.name: std-vendor-onboarding
std-vendor-onboarding.description: std-vendor-onboarding — marketplace vendor multi-step KYC + bank-link wizard. Exposes HR knobs (backgroundCheckRequired, eVerifyRequired, anonymizeOnRejection, …).
std-vendor-onboarding.statePattern: bank-link, business-info, error, identity-verify, loading, review, submitted, tax-id

std-waitlist.name: std-waitlist
std-waitlist.description: std-waitlist — sorted queue with auto-promote-on-cancel. Listens for SET_STATUS so std-lifecycle can auto-expire. Exposes Scheduling/Booking knobs (bookingWindowDays, leadTimeMinutes, cancellationPolicy, …).

std-warehouse.name: std-warehouse
std-warehouse.description: std-warehouse — physical or logical storage location. Lists warehouses; detail shows code, address, type, active flag, SKU count. Exposes Inventory/Logistics knobs (multiLocationEnabled, hazmatEnabled, …) for the questionnaire.

std-work-order.name: std-work-order
std-work-order.description: std-work-order — field-service work order lifecycle (created → assigned → en-route → on-site → completed). Lists work orders in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Assign / Travel / Arrive / Complete / Cancel actions. Listens for SET_STATUS so sibling std-lifecycle can drive automated transitions (e.g. en-route → completed on SLA breach). Exposes Service/Operations-pattern knobs (serviceAreaRadius, dispatchStrategy, SLA hours, …).

std-applicant-form.name: std-applicant-form
std-applicant-form.description: std-applicant-form — unified applicant intake: capture applicant + first interview slot atomically.

std-broadcast-builder.name: std-broadcast-builder
std-broadcast-builder.description: std-broadcast-builder composes EmailBroadcast + Segment + TemplateEditor + Modal + Confirmation into a unified broadcast-building UI

std-cart.name: std-cart
std-cart.description: std-cart — shopping cart molecule composing CartItemCartBrowse + Modal-driven add + Confirmation-driven remove + persistor coordinator.

std-ledger-entry-form.name: std-ledger-entry-form
std-ledger-entry-form.description: Tracks balanced journal-entry pairs (debit + credit) before persisting LedgerEntry rows

std-stock-adjustment.name: std-stock-adjustment
std-stock-adjustment.description: Tracks stock-level adjustments as deltas to onHand per sku/warehouse

std-accounting.name: std-accounting
std-accounting.description: Accounting: journal summaries, ledger entries, chart of accounts, AP bills, AR invoices. Pick for full-stack accounting apps. One orbital per nav destination so the app shell routes between distinct pages.

std-api-gateway.name: std-api-gateway
std-api-gateway.description: API gateway admin: routes, backends, analytics. Pick for API management dashboards.

std-ats-recruiting.name: std-ats-recruiting
std-ats-recruiting.description: ATS recruiting: job openings catalog, applicant intake pipeline, interview scheduling, and offer letters. Pick for hiring/talent apps.

std-booking-system.name: std-booking-system
std-booking-system.description: std-booking-system as a Function — providers, schedule, appointment slots, and bookings (clinic/salon/consult). Stripe-backed deposit payment, email + SMS confirmations.

std-cicd-pipeline.name: std-cicd-pipeline
std-cicd-pipeline.description: CI/CD pipeline: builds with stats and graphs, stages, and deployments backed by GitHub commits.

std-cms.name: std-cms
std-cms.description: CMS: articles, media assets, categories. Pick for editorial/publishing platforms.

std-coding-academy.name: std-coding-academy
std-coding-academy.description: Coding academy: sequence/build/event programming challenges (game-shell) plus a student progress dashboard.

std-construction-pm.name: std-construction-pm
std-construction-pm.description: Construction Project Management: active projects with RFIs, submittals, and change orders. Procore-pattern for GCs and construction PMs.

std-contract.name: std-contract
std-contract.description: Contract-management app: browse/create/edit/delete contracts under shared AppShell chrome, with a config-driven status lifecycle (std-status-lifecycle) the user can expand/collapse via the questionnaire, and a notify reaction that emails the parties when a contract is approved (std-notify-on-event, triggerStatus-gated).

std-crm.name: std-crm
std-crm.description: CRM: contacts, deals, sales pipelines, and notes. Pick for B2B sales tracking.

std-customer-success.name: std-customer-success
std-customer-success.description: Customer Success: account portfolio, health scores, NPS surveys, and renewal risk for CSMs. Pick for SaaS customer success teams.

std-devops-dashboard.name: std-devops-dashboard
std-devops-dashboard.description: DevOps dashboard: services, alerts, logs, system metrics. Pick for SRE/observability.

std-document-mgmt.name: std-document-mgmt
std-document-mgmt.description: Document management: file-centric workflow with versions, permissions, and e-signature. Pick for compliance + legal apps.

std-ecommerce.name: std-ecommerce
std-ecommerce.description: std-ecommerce as a Function — products with images, cart icon in top bar, Stripe-backed checkout.

std-embedded-dashboard.name: std-embedded-dashboard
std-embedded-dashboard.description: Use for any analytics/BI dashboard (KPIs + charts + filters + export). Every preset tile and every layout slot is config-driven; callers can swap chart types, fields, aggregations, sort, drill events, tile layout, nav, and toolbar/filter wiring without touching the .orb. DefaultDataSource fetches the (rebindable) entity and emits ITEMS_LOADED — chart traits consume it via the bus, so rebinding entityName threads through the actual data fetch.

std-event-ticketing.name: std-event-ticketing
std-event-ticketing.description: Event ticketing: organizers create events with VIP / general / early-bird tiers, attendees buy tickets, gate staff scan QR at door, waitlist auto-promotes when tickets free up. Pick for Eventbrite-style apps.

std-field-service.name: std-field-service
std-field-service.description: Field service: jobs in, assign technicians, optimize routes, check in on-site, and capture a signature on completion. Pick for plumbing/HVAC/dispatch apps.

std-finance-tracker.name: std-finance-tracker
std-finance-tracker.description: Finance tracker: transactions with stats + graphs, summary dashboard, exportable reports.

std-fitness-studio.name: std-fitness-studio
std-fitness-studio.description: Fitness studio: member directory, recurring group-class scheduling, tiered memberships, and class rosters. Pick for gym/yoga/dance studio apps (Mindbody pattern).

std-fleet-mgmt.name: std-fleet-mgmt
std-fleet-mgmt.description: Fleet Management: vehicles, drivers, maintenance, and telematics for operations and supply-chain teams running a vehicle fleet.

std-forum.name: std-forum
std-forum.description: Forum: community Q&A with threaded replies, voting, flagging, tags, and a moderator queue. Pick for Stack Overflow / Reddit / Discourse style sites.

std-healthcare.name: std-healthcare
std-healthcare.description: Healthcare clinic: patients, appointments, intake forms, prescriptions, dashboard. Composed from std atoms (Browse/Modal/Confirmation/Search/Filter/Stats/Graphs/Calendar) with email + SMS + storage services.

std-helpdesk.name: std-helpdesk
std-helpdesk.description: Helpdesk: support tickets, threaded replies, email-out, and team metrics. Pick for customer support apps.

std-hr-portal.name: std-hr-portal
std-hr-portal.description: HR portal: employees, onboarding wizard, time-off calendar, org chart. Composed from std atoms (Browse/Modal/Confirmation/Search/Filter/Stats/Graphs/Calendar) with email + storage.

std-inventory.name: std-inventory
std-inventory.description: Inventory: SKU catalog, multi-location stock levels, warehouse management, reorder rules, and adjustment history. Pick for ops/supply-chain apps.

std-iot-dashboard.name: std-iot-dashboard
std-iot-dashboard.description: IoT dashboard: devices, sensor readings, and alerts. Pick for connected-device monitoring.

std-legal-case.name: std-legal-case
std-legal-case.description: Legal Case Management: matters, billable hours, and court deadlines for law firms and in-house counsel. Pick for litigation, transactional, and regulatory practice.

std-listings.name: std-listings
std-listings.description: Listings: real-estate / jobs / classifieds. Post, browse with map + filters, save searches, and inquire via flat threads.

std-lms.name: std-lms
std-lms.description: LMS: visual course catalog (gallery), enrollment wizard, lesson playback (YouTube), progress dashboard.

std-marketing-campaign.name: std-marketing-campaign
std-marketing-campaign.description: Marketing campaigns: email/SMS broadcasts, audience segments, drip sequences, and message templates. Pick for marketing & advertising apps.

std-marketplace.name: std-marketplace
std-marketplace.description: Marketplace: vendors list products, buyers leave star ratings, admin reviews flagged listings.

std-nonprofit-donations.name: std-nonprofit-donations
std-nonprofit-donations.description: Nonprofit donations: fundraising campaigns, donors, campaign goals, and tax-deductible receipts. Pick for charity/nonprofit fundraising apps.

std-notes.name: std-notes
std-notes.description: Notes: Notion-style personal hierarchical notes with rich-text content, page tree, search, and favorites. Pick for personal/lightweight notes (vs std-wiki for collaborative team KB).

std-project-manager.name: std-project-manager
std-project-manager.description: Project manager: tasks with stats/graphs/calendar, sprints with planning, and burndown metrics. Pick for agile/scrum-style PM tools.

std-property-mgmt.name: std-property-mgmt
std-property-mgmt.description: Property Management: owner-side properties, tenants, leases, rent collection, and maintenance. Pick for landlords / property managers.

std-public-help-center.name: std-public-help-center
std-public-help-center.description: Public Help Center: admin-managed knowledge base with categories, articles, and public search. Pick for Zendesk Guide-style docs portals.

std-realtime-chat.name: std-realtime-chat
std-realtime-chat.description: Realtime chat: channels, messages, presence. Pick for Slack-style team messaging.

std-restaurant-pos.name: std-restaurant-pos
std-restaurant-pos.description: Restaurant POS: floor plan with tables, order at table, kitchen display, tip split at close. Pick for table-service restaurants.

std-retail-pos.name: std-retail-pos
std-retail-pos.description: Retail POS: sales ledger, checkout terminal, receipts, and customer accounts. Pick for general non-restaurant retail.

std-social-feed.name: std-social-feed
std-social-feed.description: Social feed: posts with images, likes, and threaded comments. Pick for Twitter/Instagram-style timelines.

std-subscription-billing.name: std-subscription-billing
std-subscription-billing.description: Subscription billing: plans browser with stats + graphs, embedded recurring-charge + trial managers, modal/confirm CRUD over plans, invoices browser, dunning queue. Composes std-lifecycle (auto-overdue scan), std-notify-on-event (customer-facing notifications), and std-audit-capture (compliance audit trail) for the invoice domain.

std-survey.name: std-survey
std-survey.description: Survey: Typeform-style builder with dynamic questions, skip-logic, response collection, and analytics.

std-time-tracking.name: std-time-tracking
std-time-tracking.description: Time Tracking: employees, timesheets, time entries, billable hours, and approvals. Pick for HR / operations teams tracking workforce hours.

std-trading-dashboard.name: std-trading-dashboard
std-trading-dashboard.description: Trading dashboard: portfolio positions, trade orders, and live market feed.

std-wiki.name: std-wiki
std-wiki.description: Wiki: rich-block authoring, page tree, version history with diff/rollback, full-text search, tags, and backlinks. Pick for internal knowledge bases.

std-book-viewer.name: std-book-viewer
std-book-viewer.description: book-viewer style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-calendar-grid.name: std-calendar-grid
std-calendar-grid.description: calendar-grid style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-case-study-organism.name: std-case-study-organism
std-case-study-organism.description: case-study-organism style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-content-renderer.name: std-content-renderer
std-content-renderer.description: content-renderer style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-data-grid.name: std-data-grid
std-data-grid.description: data-grid style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-data-list.name: std-data-list
std-data-list.description: data-list style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-detail-panel.name: std-detail-panel
std-detail-panel.description: detail-panel style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-entity-cards.name: std-entity-cards
std-entity-cards.description: entity-cards style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-feature-grid-organism.name: std-feature-grid-organism
std-feature-grid-organism.description: feature-grid-organism style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-hero-organism.name: std-hero-organism
std-hero-organism.description: hero-organism style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-media-gallery.name: std-media-gallery
std-media-gallery.description: media-gallery style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-positioned-canvas.name: std-positioned-canvas
std-positioned-canvas.description: positioned-canvas style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-pricing-organism.name: std-pricing-organism
std-pricing-organism.description: pricing-organism style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-reply-tree.name: std-reply-tree
std-reply-tree.description: reply-tree style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-showcase-organism.name: std-showcase-organism
std-showcase-organism.description: showcase-organism style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-stats-organism.name: std-stats-organism
std-stats-organism.description: stats-organism style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-step-flow-organism.name: std-step-flow-organism
std-step-flow-organism.description: step-flow-organism style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-table-view.name: std-table-view
std-table-view.description: table-view style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-table.name: std-table
std-table.description: table style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

std-team-organism.name: std-team-organism
std-team-organism.description: team-organism style atom — minted from the pattern's declared circuit descriptor.

AccountOrbital.name: AccountOrbital
AccountOrbital.description: Account orbital — extends fhir:Account, clones std-field-service's WorkOrderOrbital recipe (10 atoms).

BundleOrbital.name: BundleOrbital
BundleOrbital.description: Bundle orbital — extends fhir:Bundle, clones std-document-mgmt's DocumentOrbital recipe (17 atoms).

ChargeItemOrbital.name: ChargeItemOrbital
ChargeItemOrbital.description: ChargeItem orbital — extends fhir:ChargeItem, clones std-subscription-billing's SubscriptionOrbital recipe (12 atoms).

ClaimOrbital.name: ClaimOrbital
ClaimOrbital.description: Claim orbital — extends fhir:Claim, clones std-field-service's WorkOrderOrbital recipe (10 atoms).

ConditionOrbital.name: ConditionOrbital
ConditionOrbital.description: Condition orbital — extends fhir:Condition, clones std-healthcare's PatientOrbital recipe (15 atoms).

CoverageOrbital.name: CoverageOrbital
CoverageOrbital.description: Coverage orbital — extends fhir:Coverage, clones std-subscription-billing's SubscriptionOrbital recipe (12 atoms).

EncounterOrbital.name: EncounterOrbital
EncounterOrbital.description: Encounter orbital — extends fhir:Encounter, clones std-healthcare's PatientOrbital recipe (15 atoms).

InvoiceOrbital.name: InvoiceOrbital
InvoiceOrbital.description: Invoice orbital — extends fhir:Invoice, clones std-field-service's WorkOrderOrbital recipe (10 atoms).

ObservationOrbital.name: ObservationOrbital
ObservationOrbital.description: Observation orbital — extends fhir:Observation, clones std-healthcare's PatientOrbital recipe (15 atoms).

ProcedureOrbital.name: ProcedureOrbital
ProcedureOrbital.description: Procedure orbital — extends fhir:Procedure, clones std-booking-system's ProviderOrbital recipe (6 atoms).

std-combat.name: std-combat
std-combat.description: game atom — std-combat (states: attacking, cooldown, defeated, ready)

fields.name: text
fields.default: Welcome, adventurer. Your journey begins here.

std-gameflow.name: std-gameflow
std-gameflow.description: game atom — std-gameflow (states: gameover, menu, paused, playing)

std-movement.name: std-movement
std-movement.description: game atom — std-movement (states: colliding, idle, moving)

std-overworld.name: std-overworld
std-overworld.description: game atom — std-overworld (states: error, exploring, loading, transitioning)

std-quest.name: std-quest
std-quest.description: game atom — std-quest (states: active, available, complete, error, failed, loading, progressing)
std-quest.statePattern: active, available, complete, error, failed, loading, progressing

std-timer.name: std-timer
std-timer.description: game atom — std-timer (states: expired, idle, paused, running)

std-arcade-game.name: std-arcade-game
std-arcade-game.description: Arcade game: canvas-rendered gameplay with score and HUD.

std-logic-training.name: std-logic-training
std-logic-training.description: Logic training: debug + negotiate challenges with score tracking.

std-platformer-app.name: std-platformer-app
std-platformer-app.description: Platformer game: levels, score, and collectibles. Pick for side-scroller arcade games.

std-puzzle-app.name: std-puzzle-app
std-puzzle-app.description: Puzzle game: puzzle levels with score tracking.

std-rpg-game.name: std-rpg-game
std-rpg-game.description: RPG game: battles, world zones, items, and missions. Pick for turn-based RPGs.

std-stem-lab.name: std-stem-lab
std-stem-lab.description: STEM lab: experiments, classifications, and lab results. Pick for educational science apps.

std-strategy-game.name: std-strategy-game
std-strategy-game.description: Strategy game: armies, territories, and resources. Pick for Risk/Civ-style games.

std-marketing-article.name: std-marketing-article
std-marketing-article.description: Article section atom for marketing pages. Renders a centered prose block with title and rich content. Pick for about pages, mission statements, and blog-style content.

std-marketing-case-studies.name: std-marketing-case-studies
std-marketing-case-studies.description: Case studies grid atom for marketing pages. Renders a grid of case study cards with categories, descriptions, and links. Pick for social proof and success story sections.

std-marketing-community.name: std-marketing-community
std-marketing-community.description: Community links atom for marketing pages. Renders GitHub, Discord, and Twitter links with follower counts. Pick for open-source projects and community-driven products.

std-marketing-cta.name: std-marketing-cta
std-marketing-cta.description: Call-to-action banner atom for marketing pages. Renders a high-conversion CTA section with title, subtitle, and action buttons. Pick for conversion points at the end of pages or between sections.

std-marketing-features.name: std-marketing-features
std-marketing-features.description: Feature grid atom for marketing pages. Renders a responsive grid of feature cards with icons, titles, descriptions, and optional links. Pick for product capability showcases and benefit sections.

std-marketing-footer.name: std-marketing-footer
std-marketing-footer.description: Marketing footer atom for marketing pages. Renders a full footer with link columns, logo, and copyright. Pick for every marketing page bottom.

std-marketing-hero.name: std-marketing-hero
std-marketing-hero.description: Hero section atom for marketing pages. Renders a full-width hero with tag, title, subtitle, actions, and optional image. Pick for landing pages, product launches, and campaign microsites.

std-marketing-nav.name: std-marketing-nav
std-marketing-nav.description: Marketing navigation atom for marketing pages. Renders a sticky header with brand logo and nav links. Pick for site-wide navigation on static pages.

std-marketing-pricing.name: std-marketing-pricing
std-marketing-pricing.description: Pricing grid atom for marketing pages. Renders tiered pricing cards with plans, features, and CTAs. Pick for SaaS pricing pages and subscription showcases.

std-marketing-showcase.name: std-marketing-showcase
std-marketing-showcase.description: Showcase grid atom for marketing pages. Renders a grid of portfolio or product showcase cards with images, badges, and descriptions. Pick for product galleries and portfolio sections.

std-marketing-split.name: std-marketing-split
std-marketing-split.description: Split section atom for marketing pages. Renders a two-column layout with text and image alternating sides. Pick for feature deep-dives and alternating content sections.

std-marketing-stats.name: std-marketing-stats
std-marketing-stats.description: Stats grid atom for marketing pages. Renders a responsive grid of key metrics with values and labels. Pick for social proof, traction, and credibility sections.

std-marketing-steps.name: std-marketing-steps
std-marketing-steps.description: Step flow atom for marketing pages. Renders numbered steps horizontally or vertically. Pick for how-it-works sections and onboarding explainers.

std-marketing-team.name: std-marketing-team
std-marketing-team.description: Team grid atom for marketing pages. Renders a responsive grid of team member cards with avatars, names, roles, and bios. Pick for about pages and company culture sections.

std-marketing-testimonials.name: std-marketing-testimonials
std-marketing-testimonials.description: Testimonials atom for marketing pages. Renders social proof as logos, quotes, or badges. Pick for trust-building sections and customer validation.

std-about-page.name: std-about-page
std-about-page.description: About page molecule for marketing sites. Composes hero, articles, team grid, case studies, and CTA sections as a vertical stack of individual marketing patterns. Pick for company overviews, team showcases, and culture pages.

std-feature-detail-page.name: std-feature-detail-page
std-feature-detail-page.description: Feature detail page molecule for marketing sites. Composes hero, alternating split sections, and CTA as a vertical stack of individual marketing patterns. Pick for product deep-dives and capability explainers.

std-landing-page.name: std-landing-page
std-landing-page.description: Landing page molecule for marketing sites. Composes hero, features, stats, steps, showcase, CTA, and footer sections as a vertical stack of individual marketing patterns. Pick for product launches, SaaS homepages, and campaign microsites.

std-pricing-page.name: std-pricing-page
std-pricing-page.description: Pricing page molecule for marketing sites. Composes hero, pricing grid, FAQ accordion, and CTA sections as a vertical stack of individual marketing patterns. Pick for SaaS pricing pages and plan comparisons.

std-marketing-site.name: std-marketing-site
std-marketing-site.description: Full marketing site organism with landing, pricing, about, and feature detail pages. Pick for product websites, SaaS frontends, and campaign microsites.

std-source-scope-probe.name: std-source-scope-probe
std-source-scope-probe.description: Diagnostic: proves source-scoped listens disambiguate duplicate event names end-to-end.

std-service-calendar-ical.name: std-service-calendar-ical
std-service-calendar-ical.description: std-service-calendar-ical — iCal export service. Bind via `uses CalendarIcal from "std/behaviors/std-service-calendar-ical"` and configure `eventName` / `startsAt` / `endsAt` / `description` / `location` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourEventForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default event form (standalone surface). Generates an .ics file attendees can add to Google/Apple Calendar.

std-service-custom-bearer.name: std-service-custom-bearer
std-service-custom-bearer.description: std-service-custom-bearer — Bearer-token HTTP service. Bind via `uses CustomBearer from "std/behaviors/std-service-custom-bearer"` and configure `endpoint` / `method` / `body` / `token` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourBearerForm"` to inject your own request form; leave unset to render the atom's default test form (standalone surface).

std-service-email.name: std-service-email
std-service-email.description: std-service-email — Email send service. Bind via `uses Email from "std/behaviors/std-service-email"` and configure `to` / `subject` / `body` / `from` / `replyTo` / `templateId` / `htmlBody` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourEmailForm"` to inject your own composer; leave unset to render the atom's default test form (standalone surface).

std-service-github.name: std-service-github
std-service-github.description: std-service-github — GitHub service. Bind via `uses Github from "std/behaviors/std-service-github"` and configure `owner` / `repo` / `path` / `ref` / `op` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourGithubForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default form (standalone surface).

std-service-llm.name: std-service-llm
std-service-llm.description: std-service-llm — LLM completion service. Bind via `uses Llm from "std/behaviors/std-service-llm"` and configure `provider` / `model` / `prompt` / `temperature` / `maxTokens` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourLlmForm"` to inject your own prompt form; leave unset to render the atom's default form (standalone surface).

std-service-maps.name: std-service-maps
std-service-maps.description: std-service-maps — Maps service for geocoding, reverse-geocoding, and distance via Mapbox/Google. Bind via `uses Maps from "std/behaviors/std-service-maps"` and configure `apiKey` / `provider` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourMapsForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default geocode form (standalone surface).

std-service-oauth.name: std-service-oauth
std-service-oauth.description: std-service-oauth — OAuth sign-in service. Bind via `uses Oauth from "std/behaviors/std-service-oauth"` and configure `provider` / `scopes` / `redirectUri` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourLoginForm"` to inject your own provider button; leave unset to render the atom's default sign-in form (standalone surface).

std-service-print.name: std-service-print
std-service-print.description: std-service-print — Receipt / kitchen / label printer service (ESC/POS or web-print API). Bind via `uses Print from "std/behaviors/std-service-print"` and configure `defaultPrinter` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourPrintForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default textarea + Print button standalone surface.

std-service-redis.name: std-service-redis
std-service-redis.description: std-service-redis — Redis cache service. Bind via `uses Redis from "std/behaviors/std-service-redis"` and configure `op` / `key` / `value` / `ttl` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourRedisForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default form (standalone surface).

std-service-storage.name: std-service-storage
std-service-storage.description: std-service-storage — Object storage upload service. Bind via `uses Storage from "std/behaviors/std-service-storage"` and configure `bucket` / `acl` / `maxSize` / `allowedMimeTypes` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourUploadForm"` to inject your own picker; leave unset to render the atom's default file picker (standalone surface).

std-service-stripe.name: std-service-stripe
std-service-stripe.description: std-service-stripe — Stripe payment service. Bind via `uses Stripe from "std/behaviors/std-service-stripe"` and configure `amount` / `currency` / `metadata` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourPaymentForm"` to inject your own Stripe Elements card form; leave unset to render the atom's default test form (standalone surface).

std-service-twilio.name: std-service-twilio
std-service-twilio.description: std-service-twilio — Twilio messaging service. Bind via `uses Twilio from "std/behaviors/std-service-twilio"` and configure `recipient` / `body` / `sender` / `mode` at the call site (mapped to Twilio `to`/`body`/`from`/`mode`). Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourMessagingForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default test form (standalone surface).

std-service-youtube.name: std-service-youtube
std-service-youtube.description: std-service-youtube. YouTube embed service. Bind via `uses Youtube from "std/behaviors/std-service-youtube"` and configure `videoId` / `autoplay` / `controls` / `start` at the call site. SPECIAL: the default render IS the embed itself, so passing `uiTrait: "@trait.YourPlayerSkin"` OVERRIDES the embed (e.g., a custom player skin) rather than supplements it. Leave `uiTrait` unset to render the atom's default embed.

std-service-marketplace.name: std-service-marketplace
std-service-marketplace.description: Marketplace: products, auth, orders, payments. Pick for multi-vendor storefronts.

std-service-research-assistant.name: std-service-research-assistant
std-service-research-assistant.description: Research assistant: knowledge queries, cached results, and generated reports.
std-service-research-assistant.statePattern: complete, error, idle, results, searching, summarizing
